headline: Protecting APIs at Scale: Akamai Introduces Security Posture Center and Code-to-Runtime Mapping
summary: New capabilities transform fragmented API findings into measurable security posture and connect runtime activity to code ownership to accelerate remediationCAMBRIDGE, Mass., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Helping organizations understand and enforce API security posture at scale, Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) today introduced Security Posture Center and enhanced APIs-from-code capabilities.
